text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Biwa Hayahide and I are about to
take on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When Biwa Hayahide was little, she panicked and
seriously injured herself during a race when her
younger sister, Narita Brian, overtook her. Stuck
in a hospital bed afterward, she made a
decision...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vowed to develop an equation that would
allow her to overcome Narita Brian's raw talent so
she wouldn't lose the next time they raced.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, my journey to develop a winning
equation with Biwa Hayahide begins.
